resources.string: The shell already owns navigation. You can plug the future journal-api module into this tab when it is ready.
Home is correctly asking the shell to open Archive. The dedicated archive feature can plug in here next.
The center add action and Home CTA both route through the shell. The future create-habit feature can replace this dialog.
Home forwarded the selected habit id %1$s through a typed callback. A future editor feature can handle this flow.
